reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  This resets OP to 0 at the start of each inner loop, preventing detection of merges in later iterations of j.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  This line resets OP to 0 at the start of each inner loop, preventing the outer loop from detecting merges correctly. It should be removed or moved.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [This resets OP to 0 at the start of each inner loop, preventing detection of merges in later iterations. It should be initialized before the innermost loop, not inside the middle loop.]
